subject: civic
learning_objectives: Explain the characteristics of human rights
Identify key features that define human rights

sections.heading: Explanation
sections.content: Human rights are fundamental freedoms and privileges that belong to every individual. These rights are protected by law and are essential for human dignity and development.

sections.heading: Characteristics
sections.content: Human rights are inalienable (cannot be taken away), universal (apply to all people), indivisible (must be enjoyed as a whole), and indisputable (cannot be denied). They are also entrenched in the constitution for protection.
